feasibility_notes: Category pages (/<slug>) are server-rendered; no JS execution required to extract headline/link/source/time/rank.
/ranking/popular is a hard 404 as of recon date; do not build a ranking collector against it without rediscovering the correct current URL first.
/breakingnews/<slug> old-style paths silently redirect to homepage (200, not 404) — a collector must validate the final resolved URL and expected DOM markers, not just HTTP status.
No robots.txt exists on news.daum.net (confirmed 404); legal/ToS review of crawl permissibility is a policy decision outside this recon's scope.
